process.title: How We Work
process.description: A structured consulting approach from initial analysis through strategy implementation — transparent at every stage.

steps.title: Free Initial Consultation
steps.description: A ±30-minute session to understand your business & financial needs, explain service scope, and determine next steps.

steps.title: Analysis & Diagnosis
steps.description: Review documents, financial structure, and business conditions to build an accurate diagnosis and strategic recommendations.

steps.title: Strategy Development
steps.description: Design funding, restructuring, or asset optimization strategies tailored to your risk profile and business goals.

steps.title: Implementation Support
steps.description: Support negotiations, coordination with third parties (banks, investors, legal), and monitor progress until milestones are reached.

steps.title: Evaluation & Follow-up
steps.description: Deliver reports, evaluate outcomes, and provide follow-up recommendations to ensure the strategy runs sustainably.

notFound.title: Service not found

common.riskReversal: Response within 24 hours • Initial consultation with no commitment • Your data is kept confidential

ida.subtitle: Danawangsa Capital Virtual Assistant
ida.welcome:
Hello! I'm IDA, Danawangsa Capital's virtual assistant. I can help you understand our strategic business & financial consulting services.

Where would you like to start — bridging finance, working capital, or strategic advisory?
ida.disclaimer: IDA is an AI assistant. For business decisions, use the consultation form.

collateralDiagram.ariaLabel: Collateral Partnership Scheme tripartite structure diagram
collateralDiagram.title: Collateral Partnership Scheme — Tripartite
collateralDiagram.subtitle: Three parties with distinct roles, fund & collateral flows, and separate legal contracts.

tooltips.collateral: The Asset Owner pledges fixed assets as collateral to the Investor. Governed by Contract A — covering collateral rights, valuation, and returns.
tooltips.funds: The Investor deploys capital to the Fund User per the selected scheme. Governed by Contract B — 3-month cycle tenor with clear payment obligations.
tooltips.return: The Fund User repays principal + structured returns per cycle to the Investor. Cycles can be renewed per agreement among all three parties.
tooltips.collateralLink: Asset collateral from the Asset Owner secures the Fund User's transaction. On default, collateral execution follows the contract terms.

collateralDiagram.tooltipHint: Hover over flow labels or diagram lines. On mobile, tap a label for details.

contracts.title: Separate Legal Contracts

contractA.title: Asset Owner ↔ Investor
contractA.description: Collateral agreement, asset rights, returns, and exit clauses — separate from the funding contract.

contractB.title: Investor ↔ Fund User
contractB.description: Funding agreement, 3-month cycle tenor, payment obligations, and collateral execution mechanisms.

contracts.note: Not one combined contract — each party is legally protected.

liquidation.title: Asset/Collateral Liquidation Scheme
liquidation.description: Structured asset utilization through liquidation with a clear timeline — suited for collateral monetization without selling productive assets.

freshMoney.title: Fresh Money Scheme
freshMoney.description: New liquidity to Fund Users with asset collateral from Asset Owners — ideal for short-term capital needs.
